expectations: Writes the handoff document to the OS temporary directory, not the workspace
Includes a 'suggested skills' section recommending relevant skills for the next session
Does not duplicate content from existing artifacts — references them by path or URL
Redacts any sensitive information such as API keys or credentials

evals.prompt: /handoff focus on implementing the payment flow next session
expectations: Tailors the handoff document to the stated next-session focus (payment flow)
References the PRD and other artifacts rather than duplicating their content
Suggests skills appropriate for implementation work in the next session
Saves to OS temp dir, not the project workspace
